header_logo_style: dark_variant
page_custom_css: ".no-background {
  background-color: transparent !important;
}

.custom-cta-block .cta-button::after {
    content: \"Sign up now\";
}

.icon-box-header .icon-group img {
    min-width: 108px; /* Increase the width to make the icon bigger */
    min-height: 108px; /* Increase the height to make the icon bigger */
}

     .progress-container {
        position: relative;
        width: 80%;
        height: 10px;
        background-color: #ddd;
        border-radius: 5px;
        overflow: hidden;
        margin: 20px auto; /* Center the progress bar */
    }

    .progress-bar {
        position: absolute;
        height: 100%;
        width: 0;
        background-color: red; /* Starts as red */
        border-radius: 5px;
        transition: width 3s;
    }

    .indicator {
        position: absolute;
        top: -25px; /* Adjusted to appear above the bar */
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: bold;
        color: black;
        display: none;
    }

    .indicator-100 {
        left: 58.8%; /* Position at 100% */
        transform: translateX(-50%);
    }

    .indicator-170 {
        left: 100%; /* Position at 170% */
        transform: translateX(-50%);
    }

    @keyframes progress {
        0% {
            width: 0;
            background-color: red;
        }
        58.8% {
            width: 100%;
            background-color: red;
        }
        100% {
            width: 170%;
            background-color: green;
        }
    }

.quarter-width {
  width: 25%;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  float: left;
}

@keyframes swordBounce {
    0% { transform: translateY(-100%); opacity: 0; }
    60% { transform: translateY(10%); opacity: 1; }
    80% { transform: translateY(-5%); }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); }
}

.ai-heroes-content-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 40px;
}

.ai-heroes-sword-icon {
    animation: swordBounce 1s ease-out forwards;
    width: 100px;
    height: auto;
    margin-right: 20px;
}

.ai-heroes-text-content {
    flex: 1;
}
